raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "asserting a universal causal mechanism that frames suffering as controllable through mental correction, thereby functioning as a commitment to cognitive self-regulation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "all suffering originates in thought rather than external events or physiology",
    "thoughts can be objectively classified as 'wrong' or 'right'",
    "correction of thought is always sufficient to eliminate suffering",
    "no suffering exists independently of mental error"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent only under a strict idealism that reduces all experience to thought; otherwise contains an unfalsifiable universal quantifier ('always') that excludes counterexamples",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the user seeks to cultivate radical personal responsibility for their interpretations and is operating in domains where reframing can materially alter outcomes without denying material constraints",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "physical trauma, systemic injustice, or neuropsychiatric conditions are treated as mere 'wrong thought,' thereby discouraging appropriate external action or medical intervention"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: asserting a universal causal mechanism that frames suffering as controllable through mental correction, thereby functioning as a commitment to cognitive self-regulation
implicit_claims: all suffering originates in thought rather than external events or physiology
thoughts can be objectively classified as 'wrong' or 'right'

no suffering exists independently of mental error
